page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.large is a general-purpose virtual server instance belonging to the ecs.sn2ne family. It is built on the KVM hypervisor and features 2 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz. The instance is equipped with 8.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying on external storage options, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 1 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the ecs.sn2ne.large demonstrates entry-level performance characteristics. Its single-core CPU performance via stress-ng registers at 1092.58, placing it in the bottom 25%, while its multi-core score of 1442.69 falls into the bottom 10%. Memory bandwidth tests show 81.59 GB/sec for cached small-block reads, but uncached large-block reads and writes drop to 10.65 GB/sec and 9.53 GB/sec, respectively. Geekbench and Passmark scores similarly reflect lower-tier processing capabilities, with a Geekbench single-core score of 913.0 and a Passmark CPU score of 1834.07.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation but modest processing and memory bandwidth metrics, this instance is positioned as a cost-efficient option for lightweight, non-resource-intensive workloads. It is suitable for basic web serving, small-scale Redis caching, and minor utility tasks. It is not recommended for intensive database operations, large-scale data processing, or modern LLM inference, as demonstrated by its low throughput on a small 135M parameter model.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.large is a general-purpose instance featuring 2 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor at 2.5 GHz, paired with 8.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, and it offers a baseline network bandwidth of 1 Gbps. Benchmark results place its compute and memory performance in the lower tiers, with a stress-ng single-core score of 1092.58 and a Passmark CPU score of 1834.07. While its dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent performance, its modest resource profile and lower memory bandwidth make it best suited for lightweight workloads. It is a cost-effective choice for basic web serving, small Redis deployments, and simple utility applications that do not require high-performance computing or large storage capacities.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.large is a general-purpose virtual server with 2 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 8.0 GB RAM, and 1 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for entry-level utility workloads.

tagline: A dedicated dual-core virtual server with balanced memory for entry-level utility workloads and lightweight web serving.

8.0 GB of system memory (4.0 GB per core)
No bundled local storage or GPU hardware
Best suited for lightweight web serving and small Redis deployments
